projectName: OmniYield — Cross‑Chain NFT‑Collateralized Lending & Yield Aggregator
description: OmniYield is a modular, cross‑chain protocol that lets users lock ERC‑721/1155 NFTs in a secure vault, borrow against their floor‑price‑derived value, and automatically deploy the borrowed capital into optimized yield strategies (e.g., Uniswap V3 liquidity provision, lending markets). The core consists of a Registry that tracks whitelisted NFT collections and their floor‑price oracles, a Vault that implements ERC‑4626‑style deposit/withdrawal logic with dynamic loan‑to‑value (LTV) calculations,
angle: Captures idle NFT collections as programmable collateral to mint yield‑bearing synthetic assets across chains, creating a new liquidity layer for DeFi.
